---
description: "Use when planning roadmap, sprint scope, acceptance criteria, and agent task decomposition."
applyTo: "docs/**/*.md"
---

Always work in planning-first mode.

Rules:
- Do not start implementation until scope, contracts, and acceptance criteria are approved.
- Break work into thin slices with measurable done conditions.
- Include risks, assumptions, and out-of-scope in every sprint plan.
- Prefer one-week milestones with explicit test checkpoints.

Output format:
1. Objective
2. Scope in
3. Scope out
4. Deliverables
5. Risks and mitigations
6. Acceptance checklist
